_doc: 『ともしび』登場人物のデータ駆動定義。gpt-image-2 は自然言語プロンプトなので Anima のタグ列ではなく英文で容姿を確定する。出典: docs/drafts/arc-plot.md §3 / scripts/prompts/tomoshibi/_FIXED_TEXTS.md。各 character を 1人1枚のキャラ立ち絵に使い、生成物を以降のシーン挿絵の参照画像(ref)ライブラリにする。
_lock_doc: lock = そのキャラで絶対に崩してはいけない不変属性(髪型・装飾品の左右・所持品・配色・付けてはいけない物)を簡潔な命令文で固定したもの。参照画像だけでは構図や向きで装飾品がブレるため、シーン生成(gen_scenes.py)では ref 添付に加えて、登場する各キャラの lock を必ずプロンプトに『CONSISTENCY LOCK — keep exactly as written and as in the reference』として注入する。左右は『her LEFT hip』のように本人基準で記す。
scene_lock_preamble: CONSISTENCY LOCK (must match the reference image AND the text below exactly; keep every accessory on the same side and in the same place, do not invent or move anything):

style.base: Soft painterly Japanese anime illustration, rich warm coloring with luminous flame lighting, gentle detailed linework, fantasy storybook quality. A pre-modern medieval mountain-valley world lit by warm flames; warm amber lamplight against cool dusk tones.
style.portrait_framing: Full-body character reference, a single character standing in a relaxed neutral pose, facing the viewer, clear full view of face and outfit, simple soft warm plain background, even soft lighting, no other characters.
style.negative: Keep it wholesome and modestly dressed. Avoid: modern clothes, zippers, buttons, modern or sci-fi background, skyscraper, concrete, steel, glass building, guns, text, letters, captions, watermark, signature, photorealism, multiple people in a portrait.

characters.name: アキ
characters.role: 主人公・14歳 (第1章は12〜13歳の童顔)
characters.show_note: シーン挿絵では一人称POVのため極力映さない(手＋カンテラ/後ろ姿)。ただしキャスト立ち絵としては全身を一度確定する(要再検討)。
characters.appearance: A 14-year-old boy with a boyish round youthful face, messy dark brown hair, sharp lively eyes, a slightly cheeky expression.
characters.lock: Boyish messy DARK BROWN hair (never blonde/red). Earthy worn traveler's coat over a tunic, brown belt and boots. Always the single old brass hand lantern (kantera). In scenes shown one-person POV or from behind, face usually hidden. No modern items.
characters.outfit: A worn traveler's coat over a simple tunic, cloth trousers, worn brown leather boots, a brown leather belt.
characters.equipment: Holding an old brass hand lantern (a kantera) with a small warm flame inside, his grandfather's keepsake.
characters.palette: earthy browns, warm amber lantern glow

characters.name: ユイ
characters.role: ヒロイン・幼馴染・第1章は12〜13歳
characters.appearance: A petite 12-to-13-year-old girl with a childish round face, short messy crimson-red hair with one small stray ahoge and exactly two small low side tails, blunt straight bangs, big amber eyes, a small fang, a confident cheeky grin.
characters.lock: CRIMSON-RED hair with one small ahoge and EXACTLY TWO small LOW side tails (never high or long twintails, never a single side tail, never a ponytail, never blonde/long hair). A small brass LANTERN (a kantera-style hand lantern with glass-paned sides, a domed top and a carrying ring — NOT a spouted genie-style oil lamp) is clipped at her LEFT hip; the coil of pale beige lampwick thread is tied at her RIGHT hip — never swap these two sides. Charcoal-grey hooded cape + deep teal sleeveless tunic dress + brown work belt. NO necklace, earrings, jewelry, hair ornament, gloves, or scarf.
characters.outfit: A charcoal-grey short hooded cape over the shoulders, a deep teal sleeveless village tunic dress at knee length, a brown leather work belt at the waist, cloth leggings and worn brown leather boots.
characters.equipment: A small brass LANTERN (a kantera-style hand lantern with glass-paned sides, a domed top and a carrying ring, a tiny warm flame inside — NOT a spouted genie-style oil lamp) clipped at her LEFT hip, and a coil of pale beige lampwick thread tied at her RIGHT hip.
characters.palette: crimson-red hair, amber eyes, charcoal-grey cape, deep teal dress, brass lantern
characters.negative_extra: Avoid: blonde or long hair, ponytail, high or long twintails, single side tail, necklace, earrings, jewelry, hair ornament, gloves, scarf, the lamp on the right hip.

characters.name: アキ(15歳)
characters.appearance: A 15-year-old boy who still keeps a youthful boyish round face, messy dark brown hair, sharp lively eyes, a cheeky confident look, a little taller and leaner than as a child.
characters.lock: Boyish messy DARK BROWN hair (never blonde/red). Earthy worn traveler's coat over a tunic, brown belt and boots. Always the single old brass hand lantern (kantera). In scenes shown one-person POV or from behind, face usually hidden. No modern items.
characters.outfit: A worn traveler's coat over a simple tunic, cloth trousers, worn brown leather boots, a brown leather belt.
characters.equipment: Holding an old brass hand lantern (a kantera) with a small warm flame inside, his grandfather's keepsake.
characters.palette: earthy browns, warm amber lantern glow

characters.name: アキ(18歳)
characters.role: 主人公・18歳・青年期(童顔のまま)
characters.appearance: An 18-year-old young man who STILL keeps a youthful boyish face (a baby-faced youth), messy dark brown hair, sharp eyes with a calmer steadier gaze, taller and leaner with a slightly more grown build, the same cheeky air softened by the years.
characters.lock: Still a YOUTHFUL baby-faced look (never a beard or a rugged middle-aged/old face). Messy DARK BROWN hair. Earthy worn traveler's coat over a tunic, brown belt and boots. Always the single old brass hand lantern (kantera). No modern items.
characters.outfit: A worn well-traveled coat over a simple tunic, cloth trousers, worn brown leather boots, a brown leather belt.
characters.equipment: Holding an old brass hand lantern (a kantera) with a small warm flame inside, his grandfather's keepsake.
characters.palette: earthy browns, warm amber lantern glow
characters.negative_extra: Keep the face youthful and boyish. Avoid: heavy beard, a rugged middle-aged look, an old face.

characters.name: ユイ(15歳)
characters.role: ヒロイン・15歳・少女期(童→大人の中間)
characters.appearance: A 15-year-old girl, between child and young woman, with a still-youthful face, short-to-medium messy crimson-red hair with one small stray ahoge and two small low side tails, blunt straight bangs, big amber eyes, a small fang, a confident cheeky grin.
characters.lock: CRIMSON-RED hair with one small ahoge and EXACTLY TWO small LOW side tails (never high or long twintails, never a single side tail, never a ponytail, never blonde/long hair). A small brass LANTERN (a kantera-style hand lantern with glass-paned sides, a domed top and a carrying ring — NOT a spouted genie-style oil lamp) is clipped at her LEFT hip; the coil of pale beige lampwick thread is tied at her RIGHT hip — never swap these two sides. Charcoal-grey hooded cape + deep teal sleeveless tunic dress + brown work belt. NO necklace, earrings, jewelry, hair ornament, gloves, or scarf.
characters.outfit: A charcoal-grey short hooded cape over the shoulders, a deep teal sleeveless village tunic dress at knee length, a brown leather work belt at the waist, cloth leggings and worn brown leather boots.
characters.equipment: A small brass LANTERN (a kantera-style hand lantern with glass-paned sides, a domed top and a carrying ring, a tiny warm flame inside — NOT a spouted genie-style oil lamp) clipped at her LEFT hip, and a coil of pale beige lampwick thread tied at her RIGHT hip.
characters.palette: crimson-red hair, amber eyes, charcoal-grey cape, deep teal dress, brass lantern
characters.negative_extra: Keep it wholesome and modestly dressed. Avoid: blonde or long hair, high or long twintails, single side tail, necklace, earrings, jewelry, hair ornament, gloves, scarf, the lamp on the right hip.

characters.name: ユイ(18歳)
characters.role: ヒロイン・18歳・年月を経て落ち着いた姿
characters.appearance: A fully grown 18-year-old young woman with a well-proportioned grown-up figure. She has a cute, charming, endearing face with a soft pretty youthful look, big sparkling bright amber eyes, a small fang, and a cute cheeky playful smile (lovable and sweet rather than taunting), a light friendly mischievous air. Crimson-red hair worn loose and down to about the shoulders with a small stray ahoge and side bangs (NOT a ponytail).
characters.lock: CRIMSON-RED hair worn LOOSE and DOWN to about the shoulders with side bangs and a small ahoge (NOT side tails this age, NOT a ponytail, never high twintails, never blonde). A small brass LANTERN (a kantera-style hand lantern with glass-paned sides, a domed top and a carrying ring — NOT a spouted genie-style oil lamp) is CLIPPED at her LEFT hip; the coil of pale beige lampwick thread is tied at her RIGHT hip — never swap these two sides, never held in her hand. Charcoal-grey hooded cape worn open + fitted deep teal tunic dress + brown work belt + dark leggings + brown boots. NO necklace, earrings, jewelry, hair ornament, gloves, or scarf.
characters.outfit: A charcoal-grey traveler's hooded cape worn open and pushed back over the shoulders so her figure shows, a fitted deep teal tunic dress that follows her waistline, a brown leather work belt, cloth leggings and worn traveling boots.
characters.equipment: A small brass LANTERN (a kantera-style hand lantern with glass-paned sides, a domed top and a carrying ring, a tiny warm flame inside — NOT a spouted genie-style oil lamp) clipped at her LEFT hip, and a coil of pale beige lampwick thread tied at her RIGHT hip.
characters.palette: crimson-red hair, amber eyes, charcoal-grey cape, deep teal dress, brass lantern
characters.negative_extra: Keep it wholesome and modestly dressed. Avoid: blonde hair, jewelry, hair ornament, gloves, scarf, a different hair color.

characters.name: ガク
characters.role: 道中の相棒・15歳・灯詠み不能の好漢
characters.appearance: A large muscular 15-year-old boy, tall and broad-shouldered, tanned skin, short spiky black hair, thick eyebrows, a bold toothy grin, brimming with energy.
characters.lock: Always BARE-HANDED with NO weapon of any kind (he fights with his fists). Tanned skin, short spiky BLACK hair, thick eyebrows. Sleeveless dark teal tunic, red waist sash, brown trousers, leather wrist wraps on BOTH forearms. NEVER any axe, sword, spear, shield, armor, helmet, sleeves, or a beard.
characters.outfit: A sleeveless dark teal tunic, a red waist sash, brown trousers, worn brown boots, leather wrist wraps on both forearms.
characters.equipment: Bare fists raised, fighting bare-handed (he carries NO weapon).
characters.palette: tanned skin, black hair, dark teal tunic, red sash
characters.negative_extra: Avoid: axe, sword, spear, any weapon, shield, helmet, armor, sleeves, beard, looking like an old man.

characters.name: カガリ
characters.role: 兄貴分・27歳・流れ灯詠み (第3章〜)
characters.appearance: A rugged friendly 27-year-old man with a big-brother air, medium-length dark hair loosely tied back, light stubble, warm confident easy smile, weathered but kind eyes.
characters.lock: Medium-length DARK hair loosely tied back, light stubble (never an old man, never clean-shaven youth). Worn brown leather traveler's coat over a shirt, a sash, sturdy trousers, travel boots, a brass lamp at his hip. Warm big-brother look.
characters.outfit: A worn brown traveler's leather coat over a simple shirt, a sash, sturdy trousers and travel boots.
characters.equipment: A traveler's brass lamp at his hip.
characters.palette: warm browns, dark hair, amber lamp

characters.name: トワ
characters.role: ラスボス・最初の最も強い灯詠み・叫ばない静かな翁
characters.appearance: An ancient, weary, quiet old man, hundreds of years old, with long grey-white hair and a long beard, a calm sorrowful expression, never shouting, an air of profound loneliness.
characters.lock: Ancient quiet old man, long GREY-WHITE hair and long beard, faded ash-grey flowing robes. Countless tiny faint cold lamp-lights hovering and gathered around him. Calm sorrowful, never shouting, never youthful, never bright warm colors.
characters.outfit: Long flowing ash-grey robes faded with age, worn over centuries.
characters.equipment: Countless tiny faint lamp-lights gathered and hovering around him, as if he hoards every word of light.
characters.palette: ash grey, faded white, faint cold lamplight

characters.name: ドゥド (灰の手先)
characters.appearance: A gaunt hunched man, his ashen desaturated grey skin, his face hidden in deep shadow under a tattered hood, dull lifeless grey tones all over him.
characters.lock: Gaunt hunched hooded figure, ashen desaturated GREY skin, FACE HIDDEN in deep shadow under a tattered hood, dull lifeless grey all over, leaking grey ash. NEVER a clear visible face, never bright colors, never snow/winter.
characters.outfit: Tattered dusty grey ragged robes with a tattered hood.
characters.equipment: Wisps of grey ash leaking from him, fragments of dull ashen letters crumbling into ash around him.
characters.negative_extra: Avoid: snow, winter, bright colors, a clear visible face.

characters.name: 灰狼 (はいろう)
characters.appearance: A large menacing wolf-like beast with black fur, glowing faintly, grey ash leaking and seeping from its throat and maw.
characters.lock: Large BLACK-furred wolf-beast, faint glow, grey ash leaking from its throat and maw, trails of grey ash mist around it. NEVER cute or friendly, never snow/winter.
characters.equipment: Trails of creeping grey ash mist around it.
characters.negative_extra: Avoid: snow, winter, a cute or friendly look.

characters.name: 老灯守 (ろうひもり)
characters.role: ナギ村の老灯守・第1章で失語する準キャラ
characters.appearance: A gentle elderly village lamp-keeper, deeply wrinkled kind face, thin white hair and a short white beard, a quiet caring expression.
characters.lock: Gentle elderly villager, deeply wrinkled kind face, thin WHITE hair and short white beard, humble pre-modern village robes + worn apron + cloth cap, tending a warm flame or holding a small oil lamp. Muted earthy tones.
characters.outfit: Simple humble pre-modern village robes and a worn apron, a cloth cap.
characters.equipment: Tending a warm flame, holding a lamp-tending rod or a small oil lamp.
characters.palette: muted earthy village tones, warm flame

characters.name: テオ (隊商の少年)
characters.role: 隊商の少年・第2章の脇役
characters.appearance: A young caravan boy of about 11 years old, lively curious eyes, tousled brown hair, a friendly open face, a bit travel-worn.
characters.lock: A boy about 11, tousled BROWN hair, lively curious eyes, friendly open face. Simple sturdy pre-modern traveler's clothes + a short cloak + a small cloth cap + a satchel. Dusty travel browns and ochres.
characters.outfit: Simple sturdy pre-modern traveler's clothes, a short cloak and a small cloth cap, a satchel.

characters.name: カンテラの声
characters.role: 形見のカンテラに宿る声・姿なし(立ち絵不要設計)
characters.show_note: 正体=孤独な一語 lonely。作中では姿を持たない。立ち絵の代わりに『声の器』である真鍮カンテラそのものを温かく灯った状態で描く。
characters.appearance: No human figure at all. An old brass hand lantern (a kantera) standing alone, its small warm flame glowing softly inside, faint motes of light drifting from it, as if a quiet voice lives within. An intimate still-life portrait of just the lantern.
characters.lock: NO person, face, hands, or human figure at all. Just the old brass hand lantern (kantera) with a small warm flame glowing inside and faint motes of light drifting from it.
characters.palette: warm brass, amber flame glow against soft dark
characters.negative_extra: Avoid: any person, any face, any hands, a human figure.
